title: JuJu's Better Wynncraft: Extreme
description: With the goal of optimizing your Wynncraft experience, we have created "JuJu's Better Wynncraft" to bring you Modpacks for both Functionality and Quality of Life changes.
body:
With the goal of optimizing your Wynncraft experience, we have created "JuJu's Better Wynncraft" to bring you Modpacks for both Functionality and Quality of Life changes.

Our Modpack has 3 different versions that you can download: Essentials, Extras, and Extreme. These different versions focus on different aspects of the playing experience.

**Essentials:** The Essentials pack focuses on fast performance, whilst also including a few quality-of-life mods. Recommended for beginner mod users or users with low PC performance.

**Extras:** The Extras pack improves slightly more on performance and adds some extra quality-of-life mods. Most players will probably like this one the most.

**Extreme:** The Extreme pack adds more quality-of-life features, as well as some advanced mods. This Modpack specifically is quite resource-intensive on the Computer, so make sure that your PC can handle things like realistic physics, which can get very intense at times. Most people will probably prefer something lower.

You can download the other packs here:
- __Essentials__: https://modrinth.com/modpack/jujus-better-wynncraft
- __Extras__: https://modrinth.com/modpack/jujus-better-wynncraft-extras

You can find a list of mods on the file details page for each pack. Check back occasionally for updates!
